data.title: 国际服违规账号封禁 #58
data.summary: [3/5 (Thu) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-ga
data.body:
[3/5 (Thu) Ban Notice]

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system.

▶ Total number of players banned: 17,712 accounts
▶ Period: Permanent
▶ More details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=3394248
